message:
Release v3.6.0: Add Windows support for plugin hooks

New features:
- Cross-platform polyglot wrapper (run-hook.cmd) for Windows/Unix
- Pure bash JSON escaping for Windows compatibility
- Documentation for polyglot hooks setup
